scope.task: Create Phase 0 baseline stop report from existing outputs, one completed phase0 tmux row, and supplied subagent findings.
scope.full_results_table_scope: All complete report directories under outputs/decisive_round_2026_04/reports with baselines.json and variant_results/full.csv. HALP-only directories are excluded because they do not contain a MIND v1 full baseline. Means use primary MIND v1 rows only.
scope.primary_mean_definition: One row per model and primary dataset: POPE popular, DASH-B, POPE adversarial. Qwen POPE popular uses round2-qwen3-vl-8b-popular-final. Qwen popular-row is included in the full table and Qwen comparison, but excluded from primary means to avoid duplicate POPE popular rows.

artifact_scan.skipped_halp_dirs_reason: HALP row directories contain halp.json/halp_results.csv, not baselines.json plus variant_results/full.csv.

per_object_pr_auc.method: sklearn.metrics.average_precision_score over full.csv rows, per object, only when both labels are present

primary_rows_only.note: Primary means exclude duplicate Qwen popular-row, object-heldout, BankID, HALP, and RePOPE control rows.
Primary means exclude duplicate Qwen popular-row, object-heldout, BankID, HALP, and RePOPE control rows.

mean_notes: The POPE popular plus DASH-B mean is computed only when both primary rows exist.
The all-available mean is over primary POPE popular, DASH-B, and POPE adversarial rows present for that model.
Qwen popular-row is reported separately because it is a row split of the same dataset and would duplicate POPE popular in means.

agent_l_interpretation.dash_b: OK: observed diff is about -0.0203 from locked ~0.79.
agent_l_interpretation.pope_popular: STOP: final image_grouped diff is about +0.0993 and row diff is about +0.0834 from locked ~0.16.
agent_l_interpretation.mean: OK by the supplied finding, but the per-dataset STOP decision takes precedence.

qwen_locked_number_comparison.stop_reason: POPE popular PR-AUC does not match the locked per-dataset number even though DASH-B and the two-dataset mean are acceptable by the supplied comparison.

v1_feature_documentation.important_note: Generated feature parquet files store 43 columns, but the current full baseline uses only 32 columns: raw_drift_0..15 and cal_drift_0..15. The current default full baseline is raw_plus_calibrated_full_curve.

categories.name: raw_drift_summaries
categories.description: Summary statistics over the raw drift curve.

categories.name: calibrated_haar_energy
categories.description: Haar approximation energy plus detail energy levels 1 through 4 over calibrated drift.

categories.name: calibrated_drift_summaries
categories.description: Summary statistics over the calibrated drift curve.

issues_encountered.issue: Missing cache coverage in asset inventory
issues_encountered.details: POPE random is missing for all four asset inventories. LLaVA-OneVision-7B and Molmo-7B-D-0924 also have POPE adversarial marked missing in the cache inventory. These are cache inventory findings and do not delete existing completed report CSVs.

issues_encountered.status: not a MIND v1 code bug
issues_encountered.details: The failed ad hoc missing-variants command used object_heldout with num_folds=5 and non-retained variants. The retained object-heldout pipeline uses num_folds=2 and variants full, raw_curve_only, raw_plus_calibrated_simple, raw_plus_calibrated_full_curve.
Agent L found Qwen DASH-B and the two-dataset mean acceptable, but Qwen POPE popular differs from locked per-dataset values enough to stop. No further evaluations were launched for this report.
Raw per-sample scores are in each report variant_results/full.csv, with results.csv also present for some detector/object-heldout or row outputs.
